what: Apply the selected theme synchronously to the DOM and persist it to localStorage
why: Theme must be applied immediately without a round-trip to the server; localStorage is the right persistence layer for UI-only global preferences

steps: Call _setTheme(t) to update the SolidJS signal (triggers reactive re-renders)
Call applyTheme(t): set data-theme='light' on <html> for light, remove attribute for dark (root CSS vars are dark by default)
Write { theme: t } to localStorage under key 'nori:settings'

success_handling.criteria: Selected theme is applied to the CSS custom properties and persisted to localStorage

error_handling.scenario: localStorage write fails (e.g. private browsing quota)
error_handling.action: Silently ignore — theme is still applied to DOM for the current session
